description: Git repo context for monorepo packages + improved init-context hints
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(context): show git status and recent commits for independent sub-repo packages (config `git: true`)
- feat(task): init-context now lists auto-injected defaults and available spec files to guide AI agents
- feat(commands): add /trellis:publish-skill slash command
- feat(marketplace): add cc-codex-spec-bootstrap skill

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(context): use _is_true_config_value for isGitRepo consistency (case-insensitive)
notes: Run `trellis update` to sync. Projects with independent git sub-repos can now add `git: true` to package config to see their status in session context.
